name: Altertable
description: Send events server-side to the [Altertable REST API](https://altertable.ai/docs/product-analytics/reference/api).

environment.description: The environment to send events to
environment.label: Environment

endpoint.description: The endpoint to send events to
endpoint.label: Endpoint

actions.name: Alias
actions.description: Link a previous anonymous or temporary ID to a user ID in Altertable.

fields.label: Previous ID
fields.description: The previous user identifier (maps to distinct_id in the Altertable API).

previousId.title: Previous ID
previousId.description: The previous user identifier (maps to distinct_id in the Altertable API).

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: The ID of the user

fields.label: Anonymous ID
fields.description: The anonymous ID of the user

anonymousId.title: Anonymous ID
anonymousId.description: The anonymous ID of the user

fields.label: Context
fields.description: The context properties to send with the event

context.title: Context
context.description: The context properties to send with the event

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address of the user

os.title: Operating System
os.description: The name of the operating system

library_name.title: Library Name
library_name.description: The name of the library sending the event

library_version.title: Library Version
library_version.description: The version of the library sending the event

device_id.title: Device ID
device_id.description: The device ID of the user

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Segment channel (e.g. client, server). When set to "server" and no IP is present, $ip is set to 0 so the backend does not use the request IP.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Segment channel (e.g. client, server). When set to "server" and no IP is present, $ip is set to 0 so the backend does not use the request IP.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event

fields.label: Enable Batching
fields.description: When enabled, events are sent in batches to Altertable.

enable_batching.title: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: When enabled, events are sent in batches to Altertable.

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.description: Maximum number of events per batch request.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events per batch request.

fields.label: Batch Bytes
fields.description: Maximum batch payload size in bytes.

batch_bytes.title: Batch Bytes
batch_bytes.description: Maximum batch payload size in bytes.

fields.description: The traits of the user
